<!-- Chart CH-SPA-02 PROPORTIONAL SYMBOL MAP, role-based (themeable) -->

## PROPORTIONAL SYMBOL MAP chart (CH-SPA-02)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-SPA-02",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "magnitude",
    "comparison"
  ],
  "form": "area-true circles at supplied coordinates over a base map",
  "data_required": "base polygons + places [{name, at, value}]; absolute counts",
  "family": "SPA",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-SPA-01 (rates)",
    "CH-MAG-05 (no geography)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "rates or intensities",
      "use": "CH-SPA-01"
    },
    {
      "when": "geography adds nothing",
      "use": "CH-MAG-05"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- absolute counts anchored to places (stock, headcount, backlog)
- comparing site magnitudes in their geographic context

Do NOT use when:
- rates (symbol size reads as amount)
- more than ~10 symbols

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on first place",
  "note": "coordinates are author-supplied unit-square (0-100) geometry; the renderer scales, the author owns projection and aspect",
  "regions": "base polygons",
  "places": "[{name, at, value, highlight?}]"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,
      "y_with_eyebrow": 88,
      "size": 24
    },
    "kicker": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 28,
      "w": 24,
      "h": 4
    },
    "eyebrow": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "plot": {
      "left": 120,
      "right": 840,
      "top": 110,
      "bottom": 490
    },
    "r_max": 42,
    "label": {
      "size": 11
    }
  }
}
```

### Rules
- AREA encodes the value, never radius
- every symbol labeled with name and value
- base map stays a quiet single tint

### Never do this
- radius scaling
- colored base regions competing with symbols
- unlabeled symbols

### QA before delivering
- [ ] area-true
- [ ] labels on symbols
- [ ] highlight <= 1
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| symbol | muted |
| symbol_highlight | primary |
| label | body |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
